global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares with a call to action to try for free.

elements.label: Green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green abstract background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center featuring lighter green tones, providing a space for text and images.

elements.label: Top background layer
elements.description: A lighter green top layer that blends into the main content area, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Upper background layer
elements.description: A subtle green upper layer that adds depth to the ad's background.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, dark text stating 'Fly smarter' prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller, dark text below the headline that reads 'Special fares today', providing additional information.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A dark button at the bottom with rounded edges that says 'Try for free', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small, bold text displaying '-30%' in the bottom left corner, highlighting a discount offer.

elements.label: Additional information text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that reinforces the offer, positioned in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', encouraging user engagement.

elements.label: CloudRoute branding
elements.description: The brand name 'CloudRoute' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Discount label
elements.description: A small badge showing '30%' in the bottom left corner, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, serving as a decorative element.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered at the top, followed by the subheadline, with the call to action button at the bottom.
